title: NEW 4X4 GREEN/ RED LAND ROVER CAR WITH SILVER LIVESTOCK TRAILER 1:43 SCALE TEAMSTERS
features: Intricate 1:43 Scale: Experience the thrill of a 4x4 Land Rover and a livestock trailer in a compact, detailed 1:43 scale, perfect for collectors and kids alike
Realistic Features: Diecast car with opening doors and boot, and a plastic trailer with a pull-down ramp and side fences for added play value
Random Color Surprise: The Land Rover car arrives in either green or red, adding an element of excitement to your unboxing experience
Durable Construction: Made from a combination of metal and plastic, ensuring longevity and sturdiness for hours of play
Ideal for Ages 3 and Up: Suitable for young explorers, this toy encourages imaginative play and helps develop fine motor skills
description: Brand New and Sealed in Box This set consists of a 4x4 car complete with a livestock trailer Car is diecast and the trailer is plastic Trailer has pull down ramp and side fences and the car has opening front doors and boot This would make a great toy, or extra addition to any collectors set of model vehicles Car measures approx 13cm (5.1") long and trailer approx 12cm (4.7") long Presented in a display box Scale 1:43 Suitable for 3+ years Weight approx. 352g total. The colour of the Land Rover car can be green or red, the colour will be sent at random.
